nextAction: Phase 14 (§22.7 prompt 14): trade compliance per §20 — Incoterms 2020 reference book (/reference/incoterms: the 11 terms, risk/cost transfer, VN import notes, bilingual), HS-code register (/reference/hs-codes + [id]: HS code, description, duty rates MFN/FTA, required C/O forms e.g. Form E/D/AK, VAT; admin CRUD; link Item.hsCodeId), landed-cost estimator (/trade/estimator: item/HS lookup → CIF value + duty + VAT + fees → landed unit cost, uses fx rates from lib/fx), shipment/customs docs on the PO (C/O form, B/L, customs declaration fields or attachments per §20 scope in schema), and the §20 quote-comparison landed-cost row if the RFQ comparison exists.
